change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API

en.value:
High number of damaged or collapsed monuments, lack of multidisciplinary approach and coordination between stakeholders, weak monitoring, low capacity, lack of staff and finances, outdated building codes, strategies etc. 
Expected results: Improved protection and sustainable management of Nepal's cultural and natural heritage. Assistance in restoring & reconstructing cultural heritage damaged by the earthquakes, in an earthquake resilient manner. Coordination of various stakeholders' activities in the Greater Lumbini Area. Better management of the two Natural WH sites Chitwan & Sagarmatha. 
Key deliverable: Training workshops, stakeholders meeting, strategy development for cultural WH, extra-budgetary project fundraising for natural WH.
